name: feature-workflow
description: Feature lifecycle skills for AI coding agents: /ship-feature (the whole loop, crash-safe with --resume, merge gate), /plan-feature, /build-feature, /mr-review (independent external reviewers with context pack, static pre-pass, delta re-review), /address-review (self-learning blind-spot ledger), /land (post-merge runbook), /loop-stats (telemetry: convergence, reviewer scorecard, cost, ledger effectiveness)
